message:
data(beads,audit): sync issue tracker state and append audit index entry

- .beads/issues.jsonl: updated issue status and metadata for recently
  closed/progressed beads (scheduler tie-break restoration, peer-review
  slices, and related task tracking entries)
- audit_index.jsonl: new audit trail entry capturing the latest obligation
  lifecycle semantic trace

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
